## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring
- [ ] test: adding or updating tests
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] chore: build/CI/maintenance

## Testing

- [ ] Built successfully with XcodeGen + xcodebuild
- [ ] DomainKit tests pass (`swift test --package-path Packages/DomainKit`)
- [ ] DataKit tests pass (`swift test --package-path Packages/DataKit`)
- [ ] Tested on simulator (device + OS version: ______)
- [ ] No new warnings

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows Swift API Design Guidelines
- [ ] No force unwraps (`!`) or `try!` in production code
- [ ] No `print()` in production code (uses `os.Logger`)
- [ ] UI components have `#Preview`
- [ ] New models conform to `Sendable`
- [ ] New API endpoints documented if backend changes needed
